narrative:
Yan Diomande is a dynamic left winger for Ivory Coast, showcasing an overall rating of 7.41/10. This places him in the top 1% of left wingers at this tournament, with his rating range of 7.02–7.81 reflecting consistent high-level play. Notably, 72% of his rating stems from impressive club form over the last two seasons.

Across 331 minutes played at this World Cup, Diomande demonstrates exceptional creativity and defensive effort. He registers a high 0.487 expected assists per 90 minutes and delivers 2.991 key passes per 90 minutes. His defensive commitment is evident with 3.535 tackles per 90 minutes, although his 0.12 expected goals per 90 minutes suggests a lower direct goal threat.

Diomande's primary role for his national team is to be a key creative outlet and a diligent defensive contributor from the wing. Scouts and fans should look for his continued high volume of 0.272 assists per 90 minutes and significant key passes in upcoming matches. His blend of offensive creation and defensive work rate will be crucial for Ivory Coast's tournament progression.
